return NextResponse.json({ csrfToken: session.csrfToken, tales: await listStudioTales() });\n}\n\nexport async function POST(request: Request) {\n  const session = await requireGmCapability(\"CREATE_TALES\");\n  if (!session) return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Creator authentication required.\" }, { status: 401 });\n  if (!(await verifyCsrf(session)))\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"The creator session expired. Reload and try again.\" }, { status: 403 });\n  try {\n    return NextResponse.json(await createStudioTale({ ...(await request.json()), creatorId: session.userId }), {\n      status: 201,\n    });\n  } catch (cause) {\n    return apiError(cause);\n  }\n}\n\r\n===== src\\app\\api\\studio\\tales\\[taleId]\\draft\\route.ts =====\r\nimport { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport { requireGmCapability, verifyCsrf } from \"@/lib/security\";\nimport { apiError } from \"@/tall-tale/api\";\nimport { saveStudioDraft } from \"@/tall-tale/studio-service\";\n\nexport async function PATCH(request: Request, context: { params: Promise<{ taleId: string }> }) {\n  const session = await requireGmCapability(\"CREATE_TALES\");\n  if (!session) return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Creator authentication required.\" }, { status: 401 });\n  if (!(await verifyCsrf(session)))\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"The creator session expired.\" }, { status: 403 });\n  try {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      await saveStudioDraft((await context.params).taleId, await request.json(), session.userId),\n    );\n  } catch (cause) {\n    return apiError(cause);\n  }\n}\n\r\n===== src\\app\\api\\captain\\sessions\\[sessionId]\\simulate\\route.ts =====\r\nimport { randomUUID } from \"node:crypto\";\nimport { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport { requireGmCapability, verifyCsrf } from \"@/lib/security\";\nimport { apiError } from \"@/tall-tale/api\";\nimport { getTaleSessionState, submitVerification } from \"@/tall-tale/progression\";\n\nexport async function POST(request: Request, context: { params: Promise<{ sessionId: string }> }) {\n  const session = await requireGmCapability(\"CAPTAIN\");\n  if (!session || process.env.NODE_ENV === \"production\")\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"The development simulator is unavailable.\" }, { status: 403 });\n  if (!(await verifyCsrf(session)))\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"The Captain session expired.\" }, { status: 403 });\n  try {\n    const { sessionId } = await context.params;\n    const body = (await request.json()) as {\n      result: \"match\" | \"notMatch\" | \"uncertain\";\n      confidence?: number;\n      scenario?: \"valid\" | \"duplicate\" | \"stale\" | \"wrongBlock\" | \"wrongVersion\" | \"wrongSession\";\n      idempotencyKey?: string;\n    };\n    const state = await getTaleSessionState(sessionId, undefined, true);\n    if (!state.pendingVerification || !state.block)\n      throw new Error(\"The session has no pending verification to simulate.\");\n    const key = body.idempotencyKey ?? randomUUID();\n    const submission = {\n      schemaVersion: 1 as const,\n      eventId: randomUUID(),\n      idempotencyKey: key,\n      eventType: \"verification.result\" as const,\n      providerType: \"visionLocation\" as const,\n      providerInstanceId: \"development-simulator\",\n      sessionId: body.scenario === \"wrongSession\" ? randomUUID() : sessionId,\n      publishedVersionId: body.scenario === \"wrongVersion\" ? randomUUID() : state.session.versionId,\n      blockId: body.scenario === \"wrongBlock\" ? randomUUID() : state.block.id,\n      verificationRequestId: state.pendingVerification.id,\n      observedAt: body.scenario === \"stale\" ? new Date(0).toISOString() : new Date().toISOString(),\n      result: body.result,\n      confidence: body.confidence ?? 0.95,\n      evidence: { simulated: true, scenario: body.scenario ?? \"valid\" },\n    };\n    const result = await submitVerification(submission, { sourceType: \"simulator\", sourceId: session.userId });\n    if (body.scenario === \"duplicate\")\n      return NextResponse.json({\n        first: result,\n        duplicate: await submitVerification(submission, { sourceType: \"simulator\", sourceId: session.userId }),\n      });\n    return NextResponse.json(result);\n  } catch (cause) {\n    return apiError(cause);\n  }\n}\n\r\n===== src\\app\\api\\play\\sessions\\[sessionId]\\route.ts =====\r\nimport { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport { apiError } from \"@/tall-tale/api\";\nimport { getTaleSessionState, interactWithTaleSession } from \"@/tall-tale/progression\";\nimport { consumeRateLimit, rateLimitHeaders } from \"@/lib/rate-limit\";\nimport { authorizeTaleSessionPlayer, verifyPlayerCsrf } from \"@/platform/auth\";\n\nexport async function GET(_: Request, context: { params: Promise<{ sessionId: string }> }) {\n  try {\n    const { sessionId } = await context.params;\n    const access = await authorizeTaleSessionPlayer(sessionId);\n    if (!access) return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Voyage session required.\" }, { status: 401 });\n    return NextResponse.json({\n      ...(await getTaleSessionState(\n        sessionId,\n        access.kind === \"legacy\" ? access.token : undefined,\n        false,\n        access.kind === \"identity\",\n      )),\n      csrfToken: access.kind === \"identity\" ? access.csrfToken : undefined,\n    });\n  } catch (cause) {\n    return apiError(cause);\n  }\n}\n\nexport async function POST(request: Request, context: { params: Promise<{ sessionId: string }> }) {\n  try {\n    const { sessionId } = await context.params;\n    const access = await authorizeTaleSessionPlayer(sessionId);\n    if (!access) return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Voyage session required.\" }, { status: 401 });\n    if (access.kind === \"identity\" && !(await verifyPlayerCsrf(request.headers.get(\"x-csrf-token\"))))\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"The Player session expired.\" }, { status: 403 });\n    const rate = consumeRateLimit(`tale-player:${sessionId}`, { limit: 45, windowMs: 60_000 });\n    if (!rate.allowed)\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Too many voyage actions. Wait a moment before trying again.\" },\n        { status: 429, headers: rateLimitHeaders(rate) },\n      );\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      await interactWithTaleSession(\n        sessionId,\n        access.kind === \"legacy\" ? access.token : undefined,\n        await request.json(),\n        access.kind === \"identity\",\n      ),\n    );\n  } catch (cause) {\n    return apiError(cause);\n  }\n}\n\r\n===== SCHEMA TOP =====\r\ngenerator client {\r\n  provider = \"prisma-client-js\"\r\n}\r\n\r\ndatasource db {\r\n  provider = \"sqlite\"\r\n  url      = env(\"DATABASE_URL\")\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel Campaign {\r\n  id                 String              @id @default(cuid())\r\n  slug               String              @unique\r\n  title              String\r\n  status             String              @default(\"PAUSED\")\r\n  accessCodeHash     String\r\n  currentSequence    Int                 @default(0)\r\n  finaleState        String              @default(\"SEALED\")\r\n  finaleTeaser       String?\r\n  finaleRequirements String              @default(\"[]\")\r\n  createdAt          DateTime            @default(now())\r\n  updatedAt          DateTime            @updatedAt\r\n  chapters           Chapter[]\r\n  artifacts          Artifact[]\r\n  mapLocations       MapLocation[]\r\n  mapRoutes          MapRoute[]\r\n  sideQuests         SideQuest[]\r\n  events             ProgressEvent[]\r\n  snapshots          CampaignSnapshot[]\r\n  awards             ArtifactAward[]\r\n  journalEntries     JournalEntry[]\r\n  auditLogs          AdminAuditLog[]\r\n  saveStates         SaveStateSnapshot[]\r\n  playerAccesses     PlayerAccess[]\r\n  preparedActions    PreparedAction[]\r\n  commandExecutions  CommandExecution[]\r\n  playerPresences    PlayerPresence[]\r…24 tokens truncated…Id String?\r\n  forkedFromTaleId         String?\r\n  forkedFromVersionId      String?\r\n  playerCountMin           Int                    @default(1)\r\n  playerCountMax           Int                    @default(4)\r\n  estimatedDuration        Int?\r\n  contentWarnings          String?\r\n  sortOrder                Int                    @default(0)\r\n  featured                 Boolean                @default(false)\r\n  archivedAt               DateTime?\r\n  createdAt                DateTime               @default(now())\r\n  updatedAt                DateTime               @updatedAt\r\n  drafts                   TaleDraft[]\r\n  versions                 PublishedTaleVersion[]\r\n  assets                   TaleAsset[]\r\n  collections              TaleAssetCollection[]\r\n  locations                TaleLocation[]\r\n  storyArtifacts           TaleArtifact[]\r\n  sessions                 TaleSession[]\r\n\r\n  @@index([status, visibility, sortOrder])\r\n  @@index([creatorId, updatedAt])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel TaleDraft {\r\n  id                        String        @id @default(cuid())\r\n  taleId                    String\r\n  revisionNumber            Int           @default(1)\r\n  basedOnPublishedVersionId String?\r\n  createdBy                 String\r\n  autosaveVersion           Int           @default(1)\r\n  validationState           String        @default(\"NOT_VALIDATED\")\r\n  validationSummary         String        @default(\"{}\")\r\n  lastValidatedAt           DateTime?\r\n  createdAt                 DateTime      @default(now())\r\n  updatedAt                 DateTime      @updatedAt\r\n  tale                      TallTale      @relation(fields: [taleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n  chapters                  TaleChapter[]\r\n\r\n  @@unique([taleId, revisionNumber])\r\n  @@index([taleId, updatedAt])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel TaleChapter {\r\n  id                String       @id @default(cuid())\r\n  draftRevisionId   String\r\n  title             String\r\n  subtitle          String?\r\n  description       String?\r\n  orderIndex        Int\r\n  coverAssetId      String?\r\n  estimatedDuration Int?\r\n  entryBlockId      String?\r\n  completionBlockId String?\r\n  isOptional        Boolean      @default(false)\r\n  metadata          String       @default(\"{}\")\r\n  createdAt         DateTime     @default(now())\r\n  updatedAt         DateTime     @updatedAt\r\n  draft             TaleDraft    @relation(fields: [draftRevisionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n  blocks            StoryBlock[]\r\n\r\n  @@unique([draftRevisionId, orderIndex])\r\n  @@index([draftRevisionId])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel StoryBlock {\r\n  id            String            @id @default(cuid())\r\n  chapterId     String\r\n  blockType     String\r\n  title         String\r\n  internalLabel String?\r\n  orderIndex    Int\r\n  configuration String            @default(\"{}\")\r\n  presentation  String            @default(\"{}\")\r\n  completion    String            @default(\"{}\")\r\n  nextBlockId   String?\r\n  creatorNotes  String?\r\n  isEnabled     Boolean           @default(true)\r\n  schemaVersion Int               @default(1)\r\n  createdAt     DateTime          @default(now())\r\n  updatedAt     DateTime          @updatedAt\r\n  chapter       TaleChapter       @relation(fields: [chapterId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n  outgoing      BlockConnection[] @relation(\"BlockConnectionSource\")\r\n  incoming      BlockConnection[] @relation(\"BlockConnectionTarget\")\r\n\r\n  @@unique([chapterId, orderIndex])\r\n  @@index([chapterId, blockType])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel BlockConnection {\r\n  id                  String     @id @default(cuid())\r\n  sourceBlockId       String\r\n  targetBlockId       String\r\n  connectionType      String     @default(\"DEFAULT\")\r\n  conditionExpression String?\r\n  label               String?\r\n  orderIndex          Int        @default(0)\r\n  createdAt           DateTime   @default(now())\r\n  source              StoryBlock @relation(\"BlockConnectionSource\", fields: [sourceBlockId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n  target              StoryBlock @relation(\"BlockConnectionTarget\", fields: [targetBlockId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n\r\n  @@unique([sourceBlockId, targetBlockId, connectionType])\r\n  @@index([targetBlockId])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel PublishedTaleVersion {\r\n  id              String        @id @default(cuid())\r\n  taleId          String\r\n  versionNumber   Int\r\n  versionLabel    String\r\n  publishedAt     DateTime      @default(now())\r\n  publishedBy     String\r\n  releaseNotes    String?\r\n  contentSnapshot String\r\n  schemaVersion   Int           @default(1)\r\n  checksum        String\r\n  isCurrent       Boolean       @default(true)\r\n  tale            TallTale      @relation(fields: [taleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n  sessions        TaleSession[]\r\n\r\n  @@unique([taleId, versionNumber])\r\n  @@index([taleId, isCurrent])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel TaleAsset {\r\n  id               String                    @id @default(cuid())\r\n  taleId           String\r\n  mediaType        String\r\n  displayName      String\r\n  description      String?\r\n  originalFilename String\r\n  currentVariantId String?\r\n  mimeType         String\r\n  fileSize         Int\r\n  width            Int?\r\n  height           Int?\r\n  duration         Float?\r\n  checksum         String\r\n  createdBy        String\r\n  createdAt        DateTime                  @default(now())\r\n  updatedAt        DateTime                  @updatedAt\r\n  deletedAt        DateTime?\r\n  tale             TallTale                  @relation(fields: [taleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n  variants         TaleAssetVariant[]\r\n  tags             TaleAssetTagLink[]\r\n  roles            TaleAssetRole[]\r\n  collectionItems  TaleAssetCollectionItem[]\r\n\r\n  @@unique([taleId, checksum])\r\n  @@index([taleId, mediaType, deletedAt])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel TaleAssetVariant {\r\n  id              String    @id @default(cuid())\r\n  assetId         String\r\n  role            String\r\n  storageKey      String    @unique\r\n  mimeType        String\r\n  fileSize        Int\r\n  width           Int?\r\n  height          Int?\r\n  duration        Float?\r\n  checksum        String\r\n  processingState String    @default(\"READY\")\r\n  createdAt       DateTime  @default(now())\r\n  asset           TaleAsset @relation(fields: [assetId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n\r\n  @@index([assetId, role, createdAt])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel TaleAssetTag {\r\n  id        String             @id @default(cuid())\r\n  taleId    String\r\n  name      String\r\n  createdAt DateTime           @default(now())\r\n  assets    TaleAssetTagLink[]\r\n\r\n  @@unique([taleId, name])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel TaleAssetTagLink {\r\n  assetId String\r\n  tagId   String\r\n  asset   TaleAsset    @relation(fields: [assetId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n  tag     TaleAssetTag @relation(fields: [tagId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n\r\n  @@id([assetId, tagId])\r\n  @@index([tagId])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel TaleAssetRole {\r\n  id        String    @id @default(cuid())\r\n  assetId   String\r\n  role      String\r\n  createdAt DateTime  @default(now())\r\n  asset     TaleAsset @relation(fields: [assetId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n\r\n  @@unique([assetId, role])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel TaleAssetCollection {\r\n  id             String                    @id @default(cuid())\r\n  taleId         String\r\n  name           String\r\n  description    String?\r\n  collectionType String                    @default(\"GENERAL\")\r\n  locationId     String?\r\n  artifactId     String?\r\n  createdAt      DateTime                  @default(now())\r\n  updatedAt      DateTime                  @updatedAt\r\n  tale           TallTale                  @relation(fields: [taleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n  items          TaleAssetCollectionItem[]\r\n\r\n  @@unique([taleId, name])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel TaleAssetCollectionItem {\r\n  id           String              @id @default(cuid())\r\n  collectionId String\r\n  assetId      String\r\n  label        String?\r\n  orderIndex   Int                 @default(0)\r\n  metadata     String              @default(\"{}\")\r\n  createdAt    DateTime            @default(now())\r\n  collection   TaleAssetCollection @relation(fields: [collectionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n  asset        TaleAsset           @relation(fields: [assetId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n\r\n  @@unique([collectionId, assetId, label])\r\n  @@index([assetId])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel TaleLocation {\r\n  id                      String    @id @default(cuid())\r\n  taleId                  String\r\n  name                    String\r\n  slug                    String\r\n  region                  String?\r\n  generalDescription      String?\r\n  playerFacingDescription String?\r\n  captainNotes            String?\r\n  mapAssetId              String?\r\n  displayAssetId          String?\r\n  referenceCollectionId   String?\r\n  verificationProfile     String    @default(\"{}\")\r\n  orderIndex              Int       @default(0)\r\n  archivedAt              DateTime?\r\n  createdAt               DateTime  @default(now())\r\n  updatedAt               DateTime  @updatedAt\r\n  tale                    TallTale  @relation(fields: [taleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n\r\n  @@unique([taleId, slug])\r\n  @@index([taleId, orderIndex])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel TaleArtifact {\r\n  id                      String    @id @default(cuid())\r\n  taleId                  String\r\n  name                    String\r\n  shortDescription        String?\r\n  loreDescription         String?\r\n  ordinaryGameObjectLabel String?\r\n  artworkAssetId          String?\r\n  revealVideoAssetId      String?\r\n  modelAssetId            String?\r\n  inventoryCategory       String    @default(\"RELIC\")\r\n  collectionGroup         String?\r\n  sortOrder               Int       @default(0)\r\n  persistentAfterUnlock   Boolean   @default(true)\r\n  archivedAt              DateTime?\r\n  createdAt               DateTime  @default(now())\r\n  updatedAt               DateTime  @updatedAt\r\n  tale                    TallTale  @relation(fields: [taleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n\r\n  @@index([taleId, sortOrder])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel TaleSession {\r\n  id                   String                    @id @default(cuid())\r\n  taleId               String\r\n  publishedVersionId   String?\r\n  ownerLabel           String?\r\n  voyageName           String?\r\n  captainId            String?\r\n  accessTokenHash      String                    @unique\r\n  status               String                    @default(\"ACTIVE\")\r\n  captainMode          String                    @default(\"CAPTAIN_CONTROLLED\")\r\n  configuration        String                    @default(\"{}\")\r\n  scheduleTimezone     String?\r\n  plannedStartAt       DateTime?\r\n  launchedAt           DateTime?\r\n  cancelledAt          DateTime?\r\n  abandonedAt          DateTime?\r\n  concurrencyVersion   Int                       @default(0)\r\n  historicalHidden     Boolean                   @default(false)\r\n  archiveMetadata      String                    @default(\"{}\")\r\n  currentChapterId     String?\r\n  currentBlockId       String?\r\n  currentSequence      Int                       @default(0)\r\n  previewMode          Boolean                   @default(false)\r\n  draftRevisionId      String?\r\n  previewSnapshot      String?\r\n  variables            String                    @default(\"{}\")\r\n  inventory            String                    @default(\"[]\")\r\n  startedAt            DateTime                  @default(now())\r\n  updatedAt            DateTime                  @updatedAt\r\n  completedAt          DateTime?\r\n  expiresAt            DateTime?\r\n  lastHeartbeatAt      DateTime?\r\n  tale                 TallTale                  @relation(fields: [taleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n  version              PublishedTaleVersion?     @relation(fields: [publishedVersionId], references: [id])\r\n  events               TaleSessionEvent[]\r\n  verificationRequests TaleVerificationRequest[]\r\n  helperPairings       TaleHelperPairing[]\r\n  memberships          PlaythroughMembership[]\r\n  invitations          Invitation[]\r\n  revealStates         RevealState[]\r\n\r\n  @@index([taleId, status, previewMode])\r\n  @@index([publishedVersionId, status])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel PlayerProfile {\r\n  id           String                  @id @default(cuid())\r\n  username     String?                 @unique\r\n  passwordHash String?\r\n  displayName  String\r\n  status       String                  @default(\"ACTIVE\")\r\n  preferences  String                  @default(\"{}\")\r\n  claimedAt    DateTime?\r\n  createdAt    DateTime                @default(now())\r\n  updatedAt    DateTime                @updatedAt\r\n  lastSeenAt   DateTime?\r\n  sessions     PlayerIdentitySession[]\r\n  memberships  PlaythroughMembership[]\r\n  invitations  Invitation[]\r\n\r\n  @@index([status, displayName])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel PlayerIdentitySession {\r\n  id              String        @id @default(cuid())\r\n  playerProfileId String\r\n  tokenHash       String        @unique\r\n  csrfToken       String\r\n  expiresAt       DateTime\r\n  createdAt       DateTime      @default(now())\r\n  lastSeenAt      DateTime      @default(now())\r\n  revokedAt       DateTime?\r\n  player          PlayerProfile @relation(fields: [playerProfileId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n\r\n  @@index([playerProfileId, expiresAt])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel PlatformRoleAssignment {\r\n  id        String         @id @default(cuid())\r\n  accountId String\r\n  role      String\r\n  scopeType String         @default(\"GLOBAL\")\r\n  scopeId   String?\r\n  grantedBy String?\r\n  grantedAt DateTime       @default(now())\r\n  revokedAt DateTime?\r\n  account   GameMasterUser @relation(fields: [accountId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n\r\n  @@unique([accountId, role, scopeType, scopeId])\r\n  @@index([role, scopeType, scopeId, revokedAt])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel PlaythroughMembership {\r\n  id              String        @id @default(cuid())\r\n  playthroughId   String\r\n  playerProfileId String\r\n  role            String        @default(\"PLAYER\")\r\n  status          String        @default(\"INVITED\")\r\n  crewRole        String?\r\n  joinedAt        DateTime?\r\n  removedAt       DateTime?\r\n  completedAt     DateTime?\r\n  pinnedAt        DateTime?\r\n  hiddenAt        DateTime?\r\n  createdAt       DateTime      @default(now())\r\n  updatedAt       DateTime      @updatedAt\r\n  playthrough     TaleSession   @relation(fields: [playthroughId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n  player          PlayerProfile @relation(fields: [playerProfileId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n\r\n  @@unique([playthroughId, playerProfileId])\r\n  @@index([playerProfileId, status, updatedAt])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel Invitation {\r\n  id                   String            @id @default(cuid())\r\n  playthroughId        String\r\n  intendedPlayerId     String?\r\n  tokenHash            String            @unique\r\n  tokenPrefix          String\r\n  shortCodeHash        String            @unique\r\n  shortCodePrefix      String\r\n  pinHash              String?\r\n  recipientName        String\r\n  status               String            @default(\"CREATED\")\r\n  deliveryMethods      String            @default(\"[]\")\r\n  expiresAt            DateTime\r\n  maxRedemptions       Int               @default(1)\r\n  redemptionCount      Int               @default(0)\r\n  viewedAt             DateTime?\r\n  acceptedAt           DateTime?\r\n  declinedAt           DateTime?\r\n  revokedAt            DateTime?\r\n  lastValidatedAt      DateTime?\r\n  replacesInvitationId String?           @unique\r\n  createdBy            String\r\n  createdAt            DateTime          @default(now())\r\n  updatedAt            DateTime          @updatedAt\r\n  playthrough          TaleSession       @relation(fields: [playthroughId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n  intendedPlayer       PlayerProfile?    @relation(fields: [intendedPlayerId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)\r\n  replaces             Invitation?       @relation(\"InvitationReplacement\", fields: [replacesInvitationId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)\r\n  replacement          Invitation?       @relation(\"InvitationReplacement\")\r\n  events               InvitationEvent[]\r\n\r\n  @@index([playthroughId, status, expiresAt])\r\n  @@index([intendedPlayerId, status])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel InvitationEvent {\r\n  id           String     @id @default(cuid())\r\n  invitationId String\r\n  eventType    String\r\n  actorType    String\r\n  actorId      String?\r\n  metadata     String     @default(\"{}\")\r\n  createdAt    DateTime   @default(now())\r\n  invitation   Invitation @relation(fields: [invitationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n\r\n  @@index([invitationId, createdAt])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel RevealState {\r\n  id            String      @id @default(cuid())\r\n  playthroughId String\r\n  contentType   String\r\n  contentKey    String\r\n  status        String      @default(\"REVEALED\")\r\n  revealedBy    String?\r\n  revealedAt    DateTime    @default(now())\r\n  playthrough   TaleSession @relation(fields: [playthroughId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n\r\n  @@unique([playthroughId, contentType, contentKey])\r\n  @@index([playthroughId, revealedAt])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel PlatformAuditEvent {\r\n  id            String   @id @default(cuid())\r\n  actorType     String\r\n  actorId       String?\r\n  action        String\r\n  resourceType  String\r\n  resourceId ## Assistant
**Timestamp:** 2026-07-18T04:39:09.419Z

The architecture audit is converging: this is a single Next.js 16/React 19 application with shared Player/Captain/Studio code already in one tree, Prisma 6 dual SQLite/MySQL schemas, Zod runtime validation, and an existing idempotent verification seam. That means B-1 can be additive—new Vision domain/services and adapters around the existing story engine—without reorganizing or duplicating the UI the other task is changing.

[]);\n    const visit = (value: unknown) => {\n      if (typeof value === \"string\" && assetIds.has(value)) ids.add(value);\n      else if (Array.isArray(value)) value.forEach(visit);\n      else if (value && typeof value === \"object\") Object.values(value).forEach(visit);\n    };\n    visit(draft.tale.coverAssetId);\n    draft.chapters.forEach((chapter) => {\n      visit(chapter.coverAssetId);\n      chapter.blocks.forEach((block) => visit(block.configuration));\n    });\n    return ids;\n  }, [data, draft]);\n  const assetContexts = useMemo(() => {\n    const contexts = new Map<string, Set<string>>();\n    const add = (id: string | null | undefined, context: string) => {\n      if (!id) return;\n      const values = contexts.get(id) ?? new Set<string>();\n      values.add(context);\n      contexts.set(id, values);\n    };\n    add(draft?.tale.coverAssetId, \"TALE\");\n    draft?.chapters.forEach((chapter) => {\n      add(chapter.coverAssetId, \"CHAPTER\");\n      const visit = (value: unknown) => {\n        if (typeof value === \"string\" && data?.assets.some((asset) => asset.id === value)) add(value, \"CHAPTER\");\n        else if (Array.isArray(value)) value.forEach(visit);\n        else if (value && typeof value === \"object\") Object.values(value).forEach(visit);\n      };\n      chapter.blocks.forEach((block) => visit(block.configuration));\n    });\n    data?.locations.forEach((item) => {\n      add(item.mapAssetId, \"LOCATION\");\n      add(item.displayAssetId, \"LOCATION\");\n    });\n    data?.artifacts.forEach((item) => {\n      add(item.artworkAssetId, \"ARTIFACT\");\n      add(item.revealVideoAssetId, \"ARTIFACT\");\n      add(item.modelAssetId, \"ARTIFACT\");\n    });\n    return contexts;\n  }, [data, draft]);\n  const recentAssetIds = useMemo(() => new Set(data?.assets.slice(0, 12).map((asset) => asset.id) ?? []), [data]);\n  const filteredAssets = useMemo(() => {\n    const query = assetSearch.toLocaleLowerCase();\n    return (\n      data?.assets\n        .filter((asset) =>\n          `${asset.displayName} ${asset.description ?? \"\"} ${asset.tags.join(\" \")} ${asset.roles.join(\" \")}`\n            .toLocaleLowerCase()\n            .includes(query),\n        )\n        .filter((asset) => assetMedia === \"ALL\" || asset.media…24 tokens truncated…{ title: string; orderIndex: number } | null;\n  block: {\n    id: string;\n    blockType: string;\n    title: string;\n    configuration: JsonObject;\n    connections: Array<{ targetBlockId: string; connectionType: string; label?: string | null }>;\n  } | null;\n  pendingVerification: { id: string; providerType: string; expiresAt: string | null } | null;\n  assets: Array<{ id: string; displayName: string; url: string }>;\n};\n\nexport function PlayerRuntime({ sessionId }: { sessionId: string }) {\n  const [state, setState] = useState<State | null>(null);\n  const [answer, setAnswer] = useState(\"\");\n  const [busy, setBusy] = useState(false);\n  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n  const [connected, setConnected] = useState(false);\n  const [now, setNow] = useState(0);\n  const load = useCallback(async () => {\n    const response = await fetch(`/api/play/sessions/${sessionId}`, { cache: \"no-store\" });\n    const body = (await response.json()) as State & { error?: string };\n    if (!response.ok) setError(body.error ?? \"The voyage state could not be read.\");\n    else {\n      setState(body);\n      setError(\"\");\n    }\n  }, [sessionId]);\n  useEffect(() => {\n    queueMicrotask(() => {\n      setNow(Date.now());\n      void load();\n    });\n    const source = new EventSource(`/api/play/sessions/${sessionId}/events`);\n    source.onopen = () => setConnected(true);\n    source.onerror = () => setConnected(false);\n    source.addEventListener(\"progression\", () => void load());\n    const timer = setInterval(() => setNow(Date.now()), 500);\n    return () => {\n      source.close();\n      clearInterval(timer);\n    };\n  }, [load, sessionId]);\n  const waitRemaining = useMemo(\n    () => Math.max(0, Date.parse(state?.pendingVerification?.expiresAt ?? \"\") - now),\n    [now, state],\n  );\n  async function act(action: \"continue\" | \"confirm\" | \"answer\" | \"choice\" | \"timer\", extra: JsonObject = {}) {\n    setBusy(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    const response = await fetch(`/api/play/sessions/${sessionId}`, {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      headers: {\n        \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n        ...(state?.csrfToken ? { \"x-csrf-token\": state.csrfToken } : {}),\n      },\n      body: JSON.stringify({ action, idempotencyKey: crypto.randomUUID(), answer, ...extra }),\n    });\n    const body = (await response.json()) as { state?: State; accepted?: boolean; error?: string };\n    if (!response.ok) setError(body.error ?? \"The story could not advance.\");\n    else if (body.state) {\n      setState({ ...body.state, csrfToken: body.state.csrfToken ?? state?.csrfToken });\n      if (body.accepted) setAnswer(\"\");\n    }\n    setBusy(false);\n  }\n  if (!state)\n    return (\n      <main className=\"player-runtime loading\">\n        <p role=\"status\">{error || \"Finding the current mark on the chartâ€¦\"}</p>\n      </main>\n    );\n  const choices =\n    state.block?.blockType === \"choice\" && Array.isArray(state.block.configuration.choices)\n      ? (state.block.configuration.choices as Array<Record<string, unknown>>)\n      : [];\n  return (\n    <main className={`player-runtime ${state.session.previewMode ? \"preview-mode\" : \"\"}`}>\n      <header>\n        <div>\n          <p className=\"eyebrow\">\n            {state.session.previewMode ? \"Preview Mode â€” no real progress\" : (state.chapter?.title ?? \"Tall Tale\")}\n          </p>\n          <h1>{state.tale.title}</h1>\n        </div>\n        <div className={`runtime-connection ${connected ? \"connected\" : \"reconnecting\"}`}>\n          <i />\n          {connected ? \"Captain channel connected\" : \"Reconnecting to canonical state\"}\n        </div>\n      </header>\n      <section className=\"runtime-stage\">\n        {state.block ? (\n          <PublishedBlockView block={state.block} assets={state.assets} />\n        ) : (\n          <article className=\"runtime-block unknown-block\">\n            <h2>No safe story block is available.</h2>\n          </article>\n        )}\n        <div className=\"runtime-actions\" aria-live=\"polite\">\n          {state.session.status === \"COMPLETED\" ? (\n            <>\n              <strong>This Tall Tale is complete.</strong>\n              <Link className=\"brass-button\" href={`/play/${state.tale.slug}/history`}>\n                View voyage history\n              </Link>\n              <Link href=\"/tales\">Choose another tale</Link>\n            </>\n          ) : state.pendingVerification?.providerType === \"captainManual\" ? (\n            <div className=\"awaiting-captain\">\n              <span>â—·</span>\n              <strong>{String(state.block?.configuration.waitingText ?? \"Awaiting the Captain's approvalâ€¦\")}</strong>\n              <p>The player view will update automatically when the Captain responds.</p>\n            </div>\n          ) : state.pendingVerification?.providerType === \"textAnswer\" ? (\n            <form\n              onSubmit={(event) => {\n                event.preventDefault();\n                void act(\"answer\");\n              }}\n            >\n              <label>\n                <span>Your answer</span>\n                <input value={answer} onChange={(event) => setAnswer(event.target.value)} autoComplete=\"off\" required />\n              </label>\n              <button className=\"brass-button\" disabled={busy}>\n                {busy ? \"Testing the answerâ€¦\" : \"Submit answer\"}\n              </button>\n            </form>\n          ) : state.pendingVerification?.providerType === \"timer\" ? (\n            <button className=\"brass-button\" disabled={busy || waitRemaining > 0} onClick={() => void act(\"timer\")}>\n              {waitRemaining > 0 ? `Continue in ${Math.ceil(waitRemaining / 1000)}s` : \"Continue\"}\n            </button>\n          ) : choices.length ? (\n            <div className=\"choice-actions\">\n              <p>{String(state.block?.configuration.prompt ?? \"Choose a course.\")}</p>\n              {choices.map((choice) => (\n                <button\n                  key={String(choice.id ?? choice.label)}\n                  disabled={busy || !choice.targetBlockId}\n                  onClick={() => void act(\"choice\", { targetBlockId: choice.targetBlockId })}\n                >\n                  <strong>{String(choice.label ?? \"Choice\")}</strong>\n                  {Boolean(choice.description) && <span>{String(choice.description)}</span>}\n                </button>\n              ))}\n            </div>\n          ) : (\n            <button\n              className=\"brass-button\"\n              disabled={busy || state.block?.blockType === \"condition\" || state.block?.blockType === \"setVariable\"}\n              onClick={() => void act(\"continue\")}\n            >\n              {busy\n                ? \"Writing progressâ€¦\"\n                : String(\n                    state.block?.configuration.buttonLabel ?? state.block?.configuration.primaryLabel ?? \"Continue\",\n                  )}\n            </button>\n          )}\n          {error && (\n            <p className=\"runtime-error\" role=\"alert\">\n              {error}\n            </p>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      </section>\n      <footer>\n        <span>\n          Version {state.session.versionId.startsWith(\"draft:\") ? \"draft preview\" : state.session.versionId.slice(0, 8)}\n        </span>\n        <span>Event sequence {state.session.currentSequence}</span>\n      </footer>\n    </main>\n  );\n}\n\r\n===== src\\components\\captain\\CaptainSessionControl.tsx =====\r\n\"use client\";\n\nimport Link from \"next/link\";\nimport { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\nimport type { JsonObject } from \"@/tall-tale/types\";\n\ntype State = {\n  session: {\n    id: string;\n    status: string;\n    previewMode: boolean;\n    versionId: string;\n    ownerLabel: string | null;\n    currentSequence: number;\n    updatedAt: string;\n  };\n  tale: { title: string pendingVerification: { id: string; providerType: string; requestedAt: string } | null;\n  inventory: string[];\n  variables?: JsonObject;\n  events: Array<{\n    id: string;\n    eventType: string;\n blockType: string }> }>;\n};\n\nexport function CaptainSessionControl({ sessionId, authenticated }: { sessionId: string; authenticated: boolean }) {\n  const [state, setState] = useState<State | null>(null);\n  const [csrf, setCsrf] = useState(\"\");\n  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n  const [busy, setBusy] = useState(false);\n  const [jumpTarget, setJumpTarget] = useState(\"\");\n  const [simResult, setSimResult] = useState(\"match\");\n  const [confidence, setConfidence] = useState(0.95);\n  const load = useCallback(async () => {\n    const [detail, list] = await Promise.all([\n      fetch(`/api/captain/sessions/${sessionId}`, { cache: \"no-store\" }),\n      fetch(\"/api/captain/sessions\", { cache: \"no-store\" }),\n    ]);\n    const body = (await detail.json()) as State & { error?: string };\n    const meta = (await list.json()) as { csrfToken?: string };\n    if (!detail.ok) setError(body.error ?? \"Session detail is unavailable.\");\n    else {\n      setState(body);\n      setError(\"\");\n    }\n    setCsrf(meta.csrfToken ?? \"\");\n  }, [sessionId]);\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!authenticated) return;\n    queueMicrotask(() => void load());\n    const timer = setInterval(() => void load(), 2000);\n    return () => clearInterval(timer);\n  }, [authenticated, load]);\n  async function action(name: string, options: JsonObject = {}) {\n    if (\n      [\"rollback\", \"jump\", \"override\"].includes(name) &&\n      !window.confirm(`${name} changes canonical progression and will be written to the audit history. Continue?`)\n    )\n      return;\n    const reason = [\"rollback\", \"jump\", \"override\", \"reject\"].includes(name)\n      ? window.prompt(\"Record a reason for this Captain action:\")\n      : \"Captain control\";\n    if (reason === null) return;\n    setBusy(true);\n    const response = await fetch(`/api/captain/sessions/${sessionId}`, {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", \"x-csrf-token\": csrf },\n      body: JSON.stringify({ action: name, reason, idempotencyKey: crypto.randomUUID(), ...options }),\n    });\n    const body = (await response.json()) as { error?: string };\n    if (!response.ok) setError(body.error ?? \"Captain action failed.\");\n    await load();\n    setBusy(false);\n  }\n  async function simulate(scenario = \"valid\") {\n    setBusy(true);\n    const response = await fetch(`/api/captain/sessions/${sessionId}/simulate`, {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", \"x-csrf-token\": csrf },\n      body: JSON.stringify({ result: simResult, confidence, scenario }),\n    });\n    const body = (await response.json()) as { error?: string; code?: string };\n    setError(\n      response.ok\n        ? `Simulator accepted the ${simResult} event${scenario === \"duplicate\" ? \" and safely deduplicated its replay\" : \"\"}.`\n        : `${body.error ?? \"Simulator event rejected.\"} (${body.code ?? \"rejected\"})`,\n    );\n    await load();\n    setBusy(false);\n  }\n  if (!authenticated)\n    return (\n      <main className=\"captain-auth\">\n        <section>\n          <h1>Captain authentication required</h1>\n          <Link href=\"/quartermaster\">Open Quartermaster login</Link>\n        </section>\n      </main>\n    );\n  if (!state)\n    return (\n      <main className=\"captain-session loading\">\n        <p role=\"status\">{error || \"Opening the audited session ledgerâ€¦\"}</p>\n      </main>\n    );\n  return (\n    <main className=\"captain-session\">\n      <header>\n        <div>\n          <Link href=\"/captain\">â† All sessions</Link>\n          <p className=\"eyebrow\">\n            {state.session.previewMode ? \"Preview session\" : `Pinned ${state.session.versionId.slice(0, 12)}`}\n          </p>\n          <h1>{state.tale.title}</h1>\n          <p>\n            {state.session.ownerLabel} Â· {state.session.status.toLocaleLowerCase()} Â· sequence{\" \"}\n            {state.session.currentSequence}\n          </p>\n        </div>\n        <span className=\"polling-state\">\n          <i />\n          Canonical state Â· 2s polling\n        </span>\n      </header>\n      {error && (\n        <div className=\"captain-notice\" role=\"status\">\n          <span>{error}</span>\n          <button onClick={() => setError(\"\")}>Dismiss</button>\n        </div>\n      )}\n      <div className=\"session-control-grid\">\n        <section className=\"current-state\">\n          <p className=\"card-kicker\">Player&apos;s present position</p>\n          <h2>{state.chapter?.title}</h2>\n          <h3>{state.block?.title}</h3>\n          <span>{state.block?.blockType}</span>\n          <p>\n            {String(\n              state.block?.configuration.prompt ??\n                state.block?.configuration.heading ??\n                state.block?.configuration.body ??\n                \"No player summary configured.\",\n            )}\n          </p>\n          {state.block?.creatorNotes && (\n            <aside>\n              <strong>Private creator note</strong>\n              <p>{state.block.creatorNotes}</p>\n            </aside>\n          )}\n          <div className={`pending-request ${state.pendingVerification ? \"active\" : \"quiet\"}`}>\n            <strong>\n              {state.pendingVerification\n                ? `Pending ${state.pendingVerification.providerType}`\n                : \"No pending verification\"}\n            </strong>\n            {state.pendingVerification && (\n              <span>Waiting since {new Date(state.pendingVerification.requestedAt).toLocaleTimeString()}</span>\n            )}\n          </div>\n        </section>\n        <section className=\"captain-actions\">\n          <p className=\"card-kicker\">Authorized controls</p>\n          <div>\n            {state.pendingVerification && (\n              <>\n                <button className=\"approve\" disabled={busy} onClick={() => void action(\"approve\")}>\n                  Approve verification\n                </button>\n                <button disabled={busy} onClick={() => void action(\"reject\")}>\n                  Reject / request retry\n                </button>\n                <button disabled={busy} onClick={() => void action(\"override\")}>\n                  Explicit override\n                </button>\n              </>\n            )}\n            <button disabled={busy} onClick={() => void action(state.session.status === \"PAUSED\" ? \"resume\" : \"pause\")}>\n              {state.session.status === \"PAUSED\" ? \"Resume\" : \"Pause\"} session\n            </button>\n            <button disabled={busy} onClick={() => void action(\"presentation\")}>\n              Re-trigger presentation\n            </button>\n            <button disabled={busy} onClick={() => void action(\"releaseHint\")}>\n              Release hint\n            </button>\n            <button disabled={busy} onClick={() => void action(\"rollback\")}>\n              Rollback to prior safe block\n            </button>\n          </div>\n          <label>\n            <span>Jump target</span>\n            <select value={jumpTarget} onChange={(event) => setJumpTarget(event.target.value)}>\n              <option value=\"\">Choose block</option>\n              {state.chapters?.map((chapter) => (\n                <optgroup key={chapter.id} label={chapter.title}>\n                  {chapter.blocks.map((block) => (\n                    <option key={block.id} value={block.id}>\n                      {block.title} Â· {block.blockType}\n                    </option>\n                  ))}\n                </optgroup>\n              ))}\n            </select>\n          </label>\n          <button disabled={busy || !jumpTarget} onClick={() => void action(\"jump\", { targetBlockId: jumpTarget })}>\n            Jump with audit reason\n          </button>\n        </section>\n        <section className=\"session-debug\">\n          <p className=\"card-kicker\">Inventory and variables</p>\n          <h3>Inventory</h3>\n          <ul>{state.inventory.length ? state.inventory.map((item) => <li key={item}>{item}</li>) : <li>Empty</li>}</ul>\n          <h3>Variables</h3>\n          <pre>{JSON.stringify(state.variables ?? {}, null, 2)}</pre>\n        </section>\n        <section className=\"event-ledger\">\n          <p className=\"card-kicker\">Recent event history</p>\n          <ol>\n            {state.events.map((event) => (\n              <li key={event.id}>\n                <span>{event.sequence}</span>\n                <div>\n                  <strong>{event.eventType}</strong>\n                  <small>\n                    {event.sourceType} Â· {new Date(event.createdAt).toLocaleTimeString()}\n                  </small>\n                </div>\n              </li>\n            ))}\n          </ol>\n        </section>\n        {process.env.NODE_ENV !== \"production\" && (\n          <section className=\"verification-simulator\">\n            <p className=\"card-kicker\">Development tool Â· future provider seam</p>\n            <h2>Verification Simulator</h2>\n            <p>\n              Submits standardized evidence against the current pending request. It cannot issue an unrestricted advance\n              command.\n            </p>\n            <label>\n              <span>Outcome</span>\n              <select value={simResult} onChange={(event) => setSimResult(event.target.value)}>\n                <option value=\"match\">Match</option>\n                <option value=\"notMatch\">Not match</option>\n                <option value=\"uncertain\">Uncertain</option>\n              </select>\n            </label>\n            <label>\n              <span>Confidence {confidence.toFixed(2)}</span>\n              <input\n                type=\"range\"\n                min={0}\n                max={1}\n                step={0.01}\n                value={confidence}\n                onChange={(event) => setConfidence(Number(event.target.value))}\n              />\n            </label>\n            <div>\n              <button disabled={busy || !state.pendingVerification} onClick={() => void simulate()}>\n                Submit simulated outcome\n              </button>\n              <button disabled={busy || !state.pendingVerification} onClick={() => void simulate(\"duplicate\")}>\n                Test duplicate\n              </button>\n              <button disabled={busy || !state.pendingVerification} onClick={() => void simulate(\"stale\")}>\n                Test stale\n              </button>\n              <button disabled={busy || !state.pendingVerification} onClick={() => void simulate(\"wrongBlock\")}>\n                Test wrong block\n              </button>\n              <button disabled={busy || !state.pendingVerification} onClick={() => void simulate(\"wrongVersion\")}>\n                Test wrong version\n              </button>\n            </div>\n          </section>\n        )}\n      </div>\n    </main>\n  );\n}\n\r\n===== src\\app\\layout.tsx =====\r\nimport type { Metadata } from \"next\";\nimport { AnimationProvider } from   id: blockIds.get(block.id)!,\r\n            configuration: {\r\n              ...block.configuration,\r\n              successTargetBlockId: remapTarget(block.configuration.successTargetBlockId),\r\n              failureTargetBlockId: remapTarget(block.configuration.failureTargetBlockId),\r\n              choices: Array.isArray(block.configuration.choices)\r\n                ? block.configuration.choices.map((choice) =>\r\n                    choice && typeof choice === \"object\" && !Array.isArray(choice)\r\n                      ? { ...choice, targetBlockId: remapTarget(choice.targetBlockId) }\r\n                      : choice,\r\n                  )\r\n                : block.configuration.choices,\r\n            },\r\n          })),\r\n        })),\r\n      },\r\n      creatorId,\r\n    );\r\n  } catch (cause) {\r\n    await db.taleDraft.delete({ where: { id: draft.id } }).catch(() => undefined);\r\n    await db.tallTale\r\n      .update({ where: { id: taleId }, data: { currentDraftRevisionId: previousDraftId } })\r\n      .catch(() => undefined);\r\n    throw cause;\r\n  }\r\n  return { draftId: draft.id, basedOnPublishedVersionId: version.id, revisionNumber: draft.revisionNumber };\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport async function comparePublishedVersions(taleId: string, leftVersionId: string, rightVersionId: string) {\r\n  const versions = await db.publishedTaleVersion.findMany({\r\n    where: { taleId, id: { in: [leftVersionId, rightVersionId] } },\r\n  });\r\n  const leftRow = versions.find((version) => version.id === leftVersionId);\r\n  const rightRow = versions.find((version) => version.id === rightVersionId);\r\n  if (!leftRow || !rightRow) throw new Error(\"Choose two published versions from this Tall Tale.\");\r\n  const left = JSON.parse(leftRow.contentSnapshot) as PublishedTaleSnapshot;\r\n  const right = JSON.parse(rightRow.contentSnapshot) as PublishedTaleSnapshot;\r\n  const changes: Array<{ type: string; path: string; before?: string; after?: string }> = [];\r\n  const record = (type: string, path: string, before?: unknown, after?: unknown) =>\r\n    changes.push({\r\n      type,\r\n      path,\r\n      ...(before === undefined ? {} : { before: typeof before === \"string\" ? before : JSON.stringify(before) }),\r\n      ...(after === undefined ? {} : { after: typeof after === \"string\" ? after : JSON.stringify(after) }),\r\n    });\r\n  for (const key of [\"title\", \"subtitle\", \"shortDescription\", \"longDescription\", \"theme\", \"visibility\"] as const)\r\n    if (left.tale[key] !== right.tale[key])\r\n      record(\r\n        key === \"title\" ? \"renamed\" : key === \"visibility\" ? \"access-scope-changed\" : \"modified\",\r\n        `tale.${key}`,\r\n        left.tale[key],\r\n        right.tale[key],\r\n      );\r\n  const leftChapters = new Map(left.chapters.map((chapter) => [chapter.id, chapter]));\r\n `chapters.${id}`, chapter.title);\r\n  for (const [id, chapter] of rightChapters)\r\n    if (!leftChapters.has(id)) record(\"added\", `chapters.${id}`, undefined, chapter.title);\r\n  for (const [id, before] of leftChapters) {\r\n    const after = rightChapters.get(id);\r\n    if (!after) continue;\r\n    if (before.title !== after.title) record(\"renamed\", `chapters.${id}.title`, before.title, after.title);\r\n    if (before.orderIndex !== after.orderIndex)\r\n      record(\"moved\", `chapters.${id}.orderIndex`, before.orderIndex, after.orderIndex);\r\n    const beforeBlocks = new Map(before.blocks.map((block) => [block.id, block]));\r\n    const afterBlocks = new Map(after.blocks.map((block) => [block.id, block]));\r\n    for (const [blockId, block] of beforeBlocks)\r\n      if (!afterBlocks.has(blockId)) record(\"removed\", `chapters.${id}.blocks.${blockId}`, block.title);\r\n    for (const [blockId, block] of afterBlocks)\r\n      if (!beforeBlocks.has(blockId)) record(\"added\", `chapters.${id}.blocks.${blockId}`, undefined, block.title);\r\n    for (const [blockId, beforeBlock] of beforeBlocks) {\r\n      const afterBlock = afterBlocks.get(blockId);\r\n      if (!afterBlock) continue;\r\n      if (beforeBlock.title !== afterBlock.title)\r\n        record(\"renamed\", `chapters.${id}.blocks.${blockId}.title`, beforeBlock.title, afterBlock.title);\r\n      if (beforeBlock.orderIndex !== afterBlock.orderIndex)\r\n        record(\"moved\", `chapters.${id}.blocks.${blockId}.orderIndex`, beforeBlock.orderIndex, afterBlock.orderIndex);\r\n      for (const key of [\"blockType\", \"configuration\", \"presentation\", \"completion\", \"nextBlockId\"] as const)\r\n        if (JSON.stringify(beforeBlock[key]) !== JSON.stringify(afterBlock[key]))\r\n          record(\"modified\", `chapters.${id}.blocks.${blockId}.${key}`, beforeBlock[key], afterBlock[key]);\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n  const leftAssets = new Map(left.assets.map((asset) => [asset.id, asset]));\r\n  const rightAssets = new Map(right.assets.map((asset) => [asset.id, asset]));\r\n  for (const [id, asset] of leftAssets) if (!rightAssets.has(id)) record(\"removed\", `assets.${id}`, asset.displayName);\r\n  for (const [id, asset] of rightAssets)\r\n    if (!leftAssets.has(id)) record(\"added\", `assets.${id}`, undefined, asset.displayName);\r\n  for (const [id, before] of leftAssets) {\r\n    const after = rightAssets.get(id);\r\n    if (after && JSON.stringify(before.roles) !== JSON.stringify(after.roles))\r\n      record(\"access-scope-changed\", `assets.${id}.roles`, before.roles, after.roles);\r\n  }\r\n===== TYPES TOP =====\r\nexport type JsonObject = Record<string, unknown>;\r\n\r\nexport type InspectorField = {\r\n  key: string;\r\n schemaVersion?: number;\r\n};\r\n\r\nexport type StudioChapterInput = {\r\n  id: string;\r\n  title: string;\r\n  subtitle?: string | null;\r\n  description?: string | null;\r\n  coverAssetId?: string block.connections.map((connection) => connection.targetBlockId);\n      outgoing.set(block.id, targets);\n      for (const target of targets)\n        if (!blockIds.has(target))\n          error({\n error({\n            code: \"CHOICE_COUNT\",\n            message: `${block.title} needs at least two choices.`,\n            chapterId: chapter.id,\n            blockId: block.id,\n            field: Confirm each branch is intentional.\",\n    });\n\n  const entry = allBlocks[0]?.id;\n  if (entry) {\n    const visited = new Set<string>();\n    const queue = [entry];\n    while (queue.length) {\n      const current = queue.shift()!;\n      if (visited.has(current)) continue;\n      visited.add(current);\n      for (const target of outgoing.get(current) ?? []) if (!visited.has(target)) queue.push(target);\n    }\n    for (const block of allBlocks)\n      if (block.isEnabled && !visited.has(block.id)) {\n        const chapter = studio.draft.chapters.find((item) => item.id === block.chapterId);\n        const issue = {\n          code: \"UNREACHABLE_BLOCK\",\n          message: `${block.title} cannot be reached through the saved story graph.`,\n          chapterId: block.chapterId,\n          blockId: block.id,\n        };\n        if (chapter?.isOptional) warn(issue);\n        else error(issue);\n      }\n\n    const completionIds = new Set(\n      allBlocks.filter((block) => block.blockType === \"taleComplete\").map((block) => block.id),\n    );\n    const canComplete = new Set(completionIds);\n    let changed = true;\n    while (changed) {\n      changed = false;\n      for (const block of allBlocks) {\n        if (canComplete.has(block.id)) continue;\n        if ((outgoing.get(block.id) ?? []).some((target) => canComplete.has(target))) {\n          canComplete.add(block.id);\n          changed = true;\n        }\n      }\n    }\n    for (const block of allBlocks)\n      if (block.isEnabled && visited.has(block.id) && !canComplete.has(block.id))\n        error({\n          code: \"NO_COMPLETION_PATH\",\n          message: `${block.title} enters a branch or loop with no path to Tale Complete.`,\n          chapterId: block.chapterId,\n          blockId: block.id,\n        });\n  }\n\n  for (const asset of studio.assets)\n    if (!referencedAssetIds.has(asset.id) && asset.id !== studio.tale.coverAssetId)\n      warn({\n        code: \"UNUSED_ASSET\",\n        message: `${asset.displayName} is not used by the current draft.`,\n        assetId: asset.id,\n      });\n\n  const checkedAt = new Date();\n  const result: DraftValidationResult = {\n    valid: errors.length === 0,\n    errors,\n    warnings,\n    checkedAt: checkedAt.toISOString(),\n  };\n  await db.taleDraft.update({\n    where: { id: studio.draft.id },\n    data: {\n      validationState: result.valid ? \"VALID\" : \"INVALID\",\n      validationSummary: JSON.stringify(result),\n      lastValidatedAt: checkedAt,\n    },\n  });\n  return { ...result, autosaveVersion: studio.draft.autosaveVersion };\n}\n\r\n6:import { validateTaleDraft } from \"@/tall-tale/validation\";\n10:  constructor(public readonly validation: Awaited<ReturnType<typeof validateTaleDraft>>) {\n11:    super(\"Draft validation failed. Publish again after reviewing the current draft.\");\nimport { createHash } from \"node:crypto\";\r\nimport { db } from \"@/lib/db\";\r\nimport { eventBus } from \"@/lib/events\";\r\nimport { getStudioTale } from \"@/tall-tale/studio-service\";\r\nimport type { PublishedTaleSnapshot } from \"@/tall-tale/types\";\r\nimport { validateTaleDraft } from \"@/tall-tale/validation\";\r\nimport { logger } from \"@/lib/logger\";\r\n\r\nexport class PublishValidationError extends Error {\r\n  constructor(public readonly validation: Awaited<ReturnType<typeof validateTaleDraft>>) {\r\n    super(\"Draft validation failed. Resolve the blocking issues before publishing.\");\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function snapshotFromStudio(studio: Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getStudioTale>>): PublishedTaleSnapshot {\r\n  return {\r\n    schemaVersion: 1,\r\n    tale: {\r\n      id: studio.tale.id,\r\n      slug: studio.tale.slug,\r\n      title: studio.tale.title,\r\n      subtitle: studio.tale.subtitle,\r\n      shortDescription: studio.tale.shortDescription,\r\n      longDescription: studio.tale.longDescription,\r\n      coverAssetId: studio.tale.coverAssetId,\r\n      theme: studio.tale.theme,\r\n      visibility: studio.tale.visibility,\r\n      playerCountMin: studio.tale.playerCountMin,\r\n      playerCountMax: studio.tale.playerCountMax,\r\n      estimatedDuration: studio.tale.estimatedDuration,\r\n      contentWarnings: studio.tale.contentWarnings,\r\n    },\r\n    chapters: studio.draft.chapters.map((chapter, chapterIndex) => ({\r\n      id: chapter.id,\r\n      title: chapter.title,\r\n      subtitle: chapter.subtitle,\r\n      description: chapter.description,\r\n      coverAssetId: chapter.coverAssetId,\r\n      estimatedDuration: chapter.estimatedDuration,\r\n      isOptional: chapter.isOptional,\r\n      metadata: chapter.metadata,\r\n      orderIndex: chapterIndex,\r\n      entryBlockId: chapter.blocks[0]?.id ?? null,\r\n      completionBlockId:\r\n        [...chapter.blocks]\r\n          .reverse()\r\n          .find((block) => block.blockType === \"chapterComplete\" || block.blockType === \"taleComplete\")?.id ??\r\n        chapter.blocks.at(-1)?.id ??\r\n        null,\r\n      blocks: chapter.blocks.map((block, blockIndex) => ({\r\n        id: block.id,\r\n        chapterId: chapter.id,\r\n        blockType: block.blockType,\r\n        title: block.title,\r\n        internalLabel: block.internalLabel,\r\n        configuration: block.configuration,\r\n        presentation: block.presentation,\r\n        completion: block.completion,\r\n        creatorNotes: null,\r\n        isEnabled: block.isEnabled,\r\n        schemaVersion: block.schemaVersion,\r\n        orderIndex: blockIndex,\r\n        nextBlockId: block.connections[0]?.targetBlockId ?? null,\r\n        connections: block.connections.map((connection, connectionIndex) => ({\r\n          ...connection,\r\n          orderIndex: connectionIndex,\r\n        })),\r\n      })),\r\n    })),\r\n    assets: studio.assets.map((asset) => ({\r\n      id: asset.id,\r\n      mediaType: asset.mediaType,\r\n      displayName: asset.displayName,\r\n      description: asset.description,\r\n      mimeType: asset.mimeType,\r\n      width: asset.width,\r\n      height: asset.height,\r\n      roles: asset.roles,\r\n      variants: asset.variants.map((variant) => ({\r\n        id: variant.id,\r\n        role: variant.role,\r\n        mimeType: variant.mimeType,\r\n        processingState: variant.processingState,\r\n      })),\r\n    })) as PublishedTaleSnapshot[\"assets\"],\r\n    locations: studio.locations.map((location) => ({ ...location, captainNotes: undefined })),\r\n    artifacts: studio.artifacts,\r\n    publishedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n  };\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport async function publishTale(\r\n  taleId: string,\r\n  publisherId: string,\r\n  releaseNotes: string,\r\n  expectedAutosaveVersion?: number,\r\n) {\r\n  logger.info({ area: \"tall-tale-publish\", taleId, publisherId }, \"Tall Tale publish validation started\");\r\n  const validation = await validateTaleDraft(taleId);\r\n  if (!validation.valid) throw new PublishValidationError(validation);\r\n  if (expectedAutosaveVersion !== undefined && validation.autosaveVersion !== expectedAutosaveVersion)\r\n    throw new Error(\"The draft changed before publishing. Review the latest saved version and try again.\");\r\n  const studio = await getStudioTale(taleId);\r\n  if (studio.draft.autosaveVersion !== validation.autosaveVersion)\r\n    throw new Error(\"The draft changed during validation. Publish again after reviewing the current draft.\");\r\n  const snapshot = snapshotFromStudio(studio);\r\n  const contentSnapshot = JSON.stringify(snapshot);\r\n  const checksum = createHash(\"sha256\").update(contentSnapshot).digest(\"hex\");\r\n  const version = await db.$transaction(async (tx) => {\r\n    const latest = await tx.publishedTaleVersion.findFirst({ where: { taleId }, orderBy: { versionNumber: \"desc\" } });\r\n    const versionNumber = (latest?.versionNumber ?? 0) + 1;\r\n    const structuredReleaseNotes =\r\n      releaseNotes.trim() ||\r\n      `Published ${snapshot.chapters.length} chapters, ${snapshot.chapters.reduce((count, chapter) => count + chapter.blocks.length, 0)} story blocks, and ${snapshot.assets.length} assets${latest ? ` from version ${latest.versionLabel}` : \" as the initial release\"}.`;\r\n    await tx.publishedTaleVersion.updateMany({ where: { taleId, isCurrent: true }, data: { isCurrent: false } });\r\n    const created = await tx.publishedTaleVersion.create({\r\n      data: {\r\n        taleId,\r\n        versionNumber,\r\n        versionLabel: versionNumber === 1 ? \"1.0\" : `1.${versionNumber - 1}`,\r\n        publishedBy: publisherId,\r\n        releaseNotes: structuredReleaseNotes,\r\n        contentSnapshot,\r\n        checksum,\r\n        isCurrent: true,\r\n      },\r\n    });\r\n    await tx.tallTale.update({\r\n      where: { id: taleId },\r\n      data: { status: \"PUBLISHED\", latestPublishedVersionId: created.id },\r\n    });\r\n    await tx.platformAuditEvent.create({\r\n      data: {\r\n        actorType: \"CREATOR\",\r\n        actorId: publisherId,\r\n        action: \"TALE_VERSION_PUBLISHED\",\r\n        resourceType: \"PUBLISHED_TALE_VERSION\",\r\n        resourceId: created.id,\r\n        correlationId: crypto.randomUUID(),\r\n        metadata: JSON.stringify({ taleId, versionLabel: created.versionLabel, checksum: created.checksum }),\r\n      },\r\n    });\r\n    return created;\r\n  });\r\n  eventBus.emit(\"tall-tale:catalog\", {\r\n    type: \"catalog.updated\",\r\n    taleId,\r\n    versionId: version.id,\r\n    at: version.publishedAt.toISOString(),\r\n  });\r\n  logger.info(\r\n    { area: \"tall-tale-publish\", taleId, versionId: version.id, versionLabel: version.versionLabel },\r\n    \"Immutable Tall Tale version published\",\r\n  );\r\n  return {\r\n    id: version.id,\r\n    versionNumber: version.versionNumber,\r\n    versionLabel: version.versionLabel,\r\n    checksum: version.checksum,\r\n    publishedAt: version.publishedAt.toISOString(),\r\n  };\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function parsePublishedSnapshot(raw: string): PublishedTaleSnapshot {\r\n  const snapshot = JSON.parse(raw) as PublishedTaleSnapshot;\r\n  if (snapshot.schemaVersion !== 1 || !Array.isArray(snapshot.chapters))\r\n    throw new Error(\"This published tale uses an unsupported schema version.\");\r\n  return snapshot;\r\n}\r\n", "type": "input_text"}]

const patch = "*** Begin Patch\n*** Add File: C:\\Users\\kkids\\Documents\\Codex_TreasureHunt_Phase_B1\\Development_Docs\\AR\\Phase_B1\\B1_Repository_Audit.md\n+# Phase B-1 Repository Audit\n+\n+Status: complete before implementation  \n+Audit date: 2026-07-18  \n+Canonical repository: `https://github.com/Kgray44/treasurehuntSoT.git`  \n+Canonical integration branch: `main`  \n+Implementation branch: `codex/phase-b1-foundation`  \n+Starting commit: `0192a166699c7cb75d63d46d7acfc00ef6640ac6`\n+\n+## Governing sources reviewed\n+\n+The implementation is governed, in order, by:\n+\n+1. `TT-VISION-GOV-001` version 1.0, Governing Baseline, 127 pages.\n+2. `TT-VISION-PHASE-B-001` version 1.0, Authorized Implementation Baseline, 147 pages.\n+3. Existing project architecture and security documentation.\n+4. Existing repository conventions.\n+5. The Phase B-1 implementation prompt supplied on 2026-07-18.\n+\n+The two governing PDFs were verified with PDF metadata, extracted text, and rendered-page inspection. Canonical copies are stored under `Development_Docs/AR/Governing_Specification` and `Development_Docs/AR/Phase_B_Roadmap`. The source copies in the original checkout were not modified.\n+\n+## Git and concurrent-work safety\n+\n+The original checkout was on `main`, exactly synchronized with `origin/main` at the starting commit after `git fetch --prune origin` and a `0 0` upstream comparison. It contained two untracked governing PDFs. During this audit, a separate Tall Tale UI task also added an untracked `Development_Docs/Canonical_Player_Journal_Implementation_Record.md` in that checkout.\n+\n+To avoid overwriting or interleaving the parallel UI work, B-1 uses the isolated worktree `C:\\Users\\kkids\\Documents\\Codex_TreasureHunt_Phase_B1` on `codex/phase-b1-foundation`. No file in the original checkout was changed, staged, removed, or renamed. Before final integration, B-1 must fetch again, inspect the other task's final tree, and merge or rebase without discarding either change set.\n+\n+## Current platform inventory\n+\n+| Area | Audited implementation |\n+| --- | --- |\n+| Frontend | Next.js 16.2.10 App Router, React 19.2.4, strict TypeScript 5 |\n+| Backend | Next.js route handlers and server modules in the same application |\n+| Package manager | npm 11.9.0 with an exact `package-lock.json`; Node 24 is the documented runtime |\n+| Repository shape | Single-package application, not a monorepo; `@/*` maps to `src/*` |\n+| Database | Prisma 6.19.3; SQLite is canonical for local/test and MySQL 8 has a maintained parallel schema |\n+| Migrations | Versioned SQLite migrations under `prisma/migrations`; forward-only MySQL SQL under `prisma/mysql-migrations` |\n+| Authentication | Database-backed Game Master sessions with bcrypt and CSRF; durable Player identity sessions; legacy opaque playthrough cookies retained for compatibility |\n+| Authorization | Staff capabilities (`CAPTAIN`, `CREATE_TALES`, `PUBLISH_TALES`, `ADMIN`, and related scopes), Player membership checks, Creator ownership, and API-local resource checks |\n+| Runtime validation | Zod at route, draft, block, and verification boundaries |\n+| Logging and audit | Pino structured logging with redaction; `PlatformAuditEvent` for correlated resource actions; ordered session events for runtime truth |\n+| Testing | Vitest 4.1.10, Testing Library, Playwright 1.56.1, axe accessibility checks, database invariant scripts, production build/restart proof |\n+| Deployment | Debian/Node/MySQL/NGINX/systemd documentation; no CI workflow is currently committed |\n+| PWA | No manifest, service worker, install flow, offline shell, or update-state implementation exists |\n+| Desktop/native | No desktop shell, native bridge, Electron, Tauri, or packaged frontend implementation exists; Rust is not installed in the audited Windows environment |\n+| API documentation | Route conventions and prose documents exist, but no generated OpenAPI description exists |\n+\n+## Existing product and route structure\n+\n+The existing application already satisfies the most important shared-product premise: Player, Captain, and Studio are one Next.js source tree and share the same domain, API, design tokens, animation director, and published story snapshots.\n+\n+- Player families: `/player/*`, `/play/[taleSlug]/*`, and the original `/tale/[campaignSlug]` compatibility experience.\n+- Captain families: `/captain/*` plus `/quartermaster` and its Command Center workspaces.\n+- Studio families: `/studio/library`, `/studio/tales/*`, settings, assets, locations, artifacts, and version history.\n+- Dynamic catalog: `/tales`.\n+\n+The desktop shell should therefore package the existing application rather than extract or copy three new applications.\n+\n+## Story and persistence architecture\n+\n+`TallTale` is the stable authored identity. `TaleDraft`, `TaleChapter`, `StoryBlock`, and `BlockConnection` form the editable graph. `PublishedTaleVersion` freezes a checksummed complete snapshot. `TaleSession` is a version-pinned playthrough aggregate with current chapter/block pointers, concurrency state, ordered events, inventory, variables, and membership.\n+\n+`src/tall-tale/progression.ts` is the authoritative runtime engine. `TaleSessionEvent.idempotencyKey` and per-session sequence constraints protect progression. `TaleVerificationRequest` and `TaleVerificationEvent` already provide a versioned provider seam that checks session, published version, current block, provider, request state, observation time, and duplicate idempotency before completion. This seam currently marks `visionLocation` as future-only; B-1 can activate it behind the new server-enforced feature flag instead of building a second progression engine.\n+\n+The Studio editor registry already owns block identity, defaults, fields, runtime Zod schemas, and provider selection. The B-1 story block should extend that registry and preserve its graph/publishing rules. Because Studio autosave replaces chapter/block rows transactionally, `StoryWaypointBinding` synchronization must occur inside that same save transaction so real bindings cannot disappear or point to drafts.\n+\n+## Existing event and verification boundaries\n+\n+The system already has the correct truth boundary for B-1:\n+\n+```text\n+published block activates\n+  -> TaleVerificationRequest is persisted\n+  -> a provider submits versioned evidence\n+  -> current session/version/block/request are rechecked\n+  -> TaleVerificationEvent is persisted\n+  -> an ordered TaleSessionEvent is appended\n+  -> the same completion engine advances exactly once\n+```\n+\n+B-1 will add a versioned Vision protocol and persistent `VerificationAttempt` state machine around this seam. The deterministic verifier remains mock-only, while storage, adapter invocation, stale checks, event delivery, and idempotency remain real.\n+\n+## Build and validation workflow\n+\n+`npm run validate` is the repository release gate. It creates a clean disposable SQLite database, deploys migrations, seeds generic data, checks database invariants, runs formatting, lint, strict type checking, Vitest, local asset validation, Chromium/WebKit Playwright coverage, post-acceptance database checks, an optimized production build, and two production restart proofs. Shared-database mutations run in Chromium only; WebKit remains appropriate for read-only, accessibility, responsive, and reduced-motion checks.\n+\n+B-1 must extend this gate with protocol, lifecycle, migration, adapter, PWA, desktop-boundary, and end-to-end mock verification coverage. A desktop packaging command must also run separately because the existing gate has no native packaging stage.\n+\n+## Architecture fit decisions from the audit\n+\n+1. Keep the single Next.js application as the shared web UI and server. Introduce bounded `src/vision/*` modules rather than force a monorepo migration during B-1.\n+2. Select Electron for the B-1 desktop shell. The current application depends on dynamic Next.js server components, route handlers, Prisma, and authentication. Electron can package and launch the existing Next standalone server and render the exact same routes from local bundled assets. Tauri would require a new Rust toolchain plus a separately bundled Node sidecar for the same server runtime, adding two native toolchains without reducing the B-1 trust boundary. This choice requires an ADR and a narrow, context-isolated IPC allowlist.\n+3. Add a service worker manually with explicit cache allowlists. Never cache `/api/*`, authentication, mutable story state, attempts, pairing data, or staff data.\n+4. Extend both Prisma schemas additively. Published waypoint versions use `publishedAt` plus an immutable publication row and service guards; stories pin an exact `waypointVersionId`.\n+5. Reuse `TaleVerificationRequest`, `TaleVerificationEvent`, and the authoritative progression engine for story delivery. Add the B-1 attempt record and transitions; do not fork progression logic.\n+6. Use Zod as the canonical runtime protocol and draft/package validation technology because it is already used across both web and server runtimes.\n+7. Keep feature flags typed and centralized. Server authorization and server-enforced flags remain authoritative; browser flags only control presentation and adapter selection.\n+8. Preserve existing visual structure. New pages and controls use the current parchment, ocean, brass, focus, reduced-motion, and responsive conventions.\n+\n+## Principal risks and controls\n+\n+- Concurrent UI work: isolate the branch/worktree, re-fetch before final integration, and resolve textual overlap explicitly.\n+- Autosave row replacement: recreate and validate waypoint bindings inside the draft transaction.\n+- Mock leakage: development/test flags, production-off defaults, explicit adapter names, and production-wiring tests.\n+- Published mutation: database uniqueness, publication identity/hash, service-level edit guards, and immutable-version tests.\n+- Desktop native abuse: `contextIsolation`, no Node integration in the renderer, fixed IPC channels, no arbitrary path/command arguments, and local packaged application content.\n+- PWA data leakage: static-asset allowlist only, network-only APIs, versioned cache names, and tests that enumerate prohibited paths.\n+- MySQL drift: maintain matching SQL and run Prisma schema validation plus syntax/invariant checks even though a live MySQL service is not currently available.\n+\n+## Audit conclusion\n+\n+The repository can support B-1 additively. Its existing immutable Tall Tale snapshots, provider seam, ordered idempotent events, staff/Player security model, and shared UI reduce implementation risk. The primary new foundations are the persistent waypoint/version domain, typed protocol, adapter boundary, attempt state machine, Studio waypoint surfaces, story binding, Player/Captain mock workflow, safe PWA, locally packaged desktop shell, and evidence-backed documentation.\n*** End Patch";
text(await tools.apply_patch(patch));
